playbook.intent: Agent builder wires faion CLI as structured methodology lookup → no markdown parsing, emits faion-citation tokens.
playbook.scope: Agent builder wires faion CLI as a structured methodology lookup inside their agent (RAG-as-a-service / SDR / code-review bot) without parsing human-readable markdown, and emits faion-citation tokens in agent output.

success-criteria.criterion: Faion exposed as a tool the agent can call
Citation tokens emitted with version + content_id

stage.name: Tool Wrap
stage.intent: Wrap faion CLI as an agent tool with strict schema.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when contract tests pass on the wrapper.

stage.name: Context Hygiene
stage.intent: Manifest-then-fetch + progressive disclosure to keep context lean.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when context budget holds on the longest trace.

stage.name: Citation Contract
stage.intent: Emit faion citation tokens with content_id + version.

tasks.task: Eval that asserts citations are present + traceable

stage.decision-gate: Ship only when eval asserts every grounded answer has a citation.

extra.value: [Building a public faion API wrapper SDK — out of scope, End-user-facing search UI]
[Faion CLI installed and authenticated, Agent with tool-call support]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content faion-as-programmatic-context-source --format md, agent: faion get-content faion-as-programmatic-context-source --format context, json: faion get-content faion-as-programmatic-context-source --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
